evals.prompt: Cut video segment from video.mp4 from 00:01:30 to 00:02:45 and save as clip.mp4
evals.expected_output: Clip segment from video.mp4 from 00:01:30 to 00:02:45 saved as clip.mp4
assertions: check if clip.mp4 duration is between 1 minute and 2 minutes

evals.prompt: Merge part1.mp4, part2.mp4, and part3.mp4 into a single file named merged.mp4
evals.expected_output: Videos part1.mp4, part2.mp4, and part3.mp4 merged into a single file named merged.mp4
assertions: check if merged.mp4 contains all parts

evals.prompt: Extract audio from video.mp4 and save as audio.mp3
evals.expected_output: Audio extracted from video.mp4 and saved as audio.mp3
assertions: check if audio.mp3 is in MP3 format

evals.prompt: Generate a thumbnail from video.mp4 at 00:00:15 and save as frame.jpg
evals.expected_output: Thumbnail generated from video.mp4 at 00:00:15 and saved as frame.jpg
assertions: check if frame.jpg is a valid image

evals.prompt: Create a GIF from video.mp4 from 00:00:10 to 00:00:15 and save as clip.gif
evals.expected_output: GIF created from video.mp4 from 00:00:10 to 00:00:15 and saved as clip.gif
assertions: check if clip.gif is a valid GIF
